Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of A Minor.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for petitioner Anita Player, the Guardian Ad Litem for the minor, Kavonte Burnett.
Neither petitioner nor the minor were present at today's hearing.
Order waiving the appearance of petitioner and the minor at today's hearing was filed January 11, 2010.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $12,337.50.
Attorney's Fees - $1,336.11.
Costs - $6,993.09.

The net balance of $4,008.30 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 1405 Lloyd Center, Portland, OR 97232. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order, or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Additionally, future settlements from defendants in this action may be accepted by petitioner Audrey Leslie, as Guardian Ad Litem of Jelani Leslie, and that 30% of the net settlements shall be distributed pursuant to this Order without the necessity of further petitions being made to the Court.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.
